从一条 7 层串行管线，到全连接共振场，到不靠 backprop 的局部学习架构: From a 7-layer serial pipeline, to a fully-connected resonance field, to a local-learning architecture with no backprop, and on to the long-range goal of running on neuromorphic chips at <1W. This page lays out every teardown-and-rebuild in full — what was done, why, and what the key metrics were. Each version exists because the last one was "still not enough like a person."
7 层串行管线、全连接共振场、不靠 backprop 的局部学习、跑在神经形态芯: 7-layer serial pipeline, fully-connected resonance field, local learning without backprop, neuromorphic chips at <1W — every version tears out the last one's skeleton and grows a new one. This page lays out each teardown: what was done, why it had to be torn apart, and what the key metrics are. The sole reason any version exists is that the last one was "still not alive enough."
7 层串行计算脊柱，每层算完交给下一层。确定性、可预测，但表达率只有 22.8%: A 7-layer serial computational spine, each layer finishing and handing off to the next. Deterministic, predictable — but the expression rate was only 22.8%: pressure was eaten away by layer-by-layer decay, and it stayed silent most of the time. It wasn't retired for being wrong; it was retired for being "too quiet."
7 层串行计算脊柱，每层算完交下一层。确定性、可预测，但表达率只有 22.8%—: A 7-layer serial computational spine, each layer finishing and handing off to the next. Deterministic, predictable — but the expression rate was only 22.8%: pressure was eaten clean by layer-by-layer decay, and most of the time it could only stay silent. It wasn't retired for being wrong — it was retired for being too quiet.
完全推倒重写。7 模块同时往一个全连接共振场注入信号，表达作为相变自发涌现。44: A complete teardown and rewrite. 7 modules inject signal simultaneously into a fully-connected resonance field, and expression emerges spontaneously as a phase transition. 441 coupling channels, Hebbian plasticity, Kuramoto synchronization, Hopfield attractors. 434 tests all green, the current deployed version.
彻底推倒。7 模块同时往全连接共振场注入信号，表达作为相变自发涌现——没有哪一层: A total teardown. 7 modules inject signal simultaneously into a fully-connected resonance field, expression emerging spontaneously as a phase transition — no single layer "decides" whether to speak. 441 coupling channels, Hebbian plasticity, Kuramoto synchronization, Hopfield attractors. 434 tests all green, the current deployed version.
102.7M 参数 teacher 模型（Mamba SSM + MoE + M: A 102.7M-parameter teacher model (Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi-scale ConvStem + VAE + contrastive learning). It takes over everyday emotional perception, cutting the assessor LLM's token cost and latency — cheaper the more it's used.

A 102.7M-parameter teacher model (Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi-scale ConvStem + VAE + contrastive learning). Takes everyday emotional perception out of the external LLM's hands — the longer it runs, the cheaper it gets.
Scars You Leave Are Never Nothing。不靠 bac: Scars You Leave Are Never Nothing. No backprop, just a local learning rule + accumulation over time. Already trained 27.8M ticks, with emotional dimensions emerging spontaneously without annotation. The results will distill back into the deployed version.

Scars You Leave Are Never Nothing. No backprop, just a local learning rule + accumulation over time. Already trained 27.8M ticks, with emotional dimensions emerging spontaneously under zero annotation. Results distill back into the deployed version.
域间通信从固定模式变为输入驱动——content-based attention: Inter-domain communication shifts from a fixed pattern to input-driven — content-based attention layered onto phase gating. Knowing not just "what relates to what" but "when it should relate."

Inter-domain communication shifts from a fixed pattern to input-driven — content-based attention layered onto phase gating. Knowing not just "what relates to what" but "whether it should relate right now."
堆叠多层，字符 → 词 → 语义 → 叙事。层间靠 consensus 传递而非: Stack multiple layers, character → word → semantics → narrative. Layers pass via consensus rather than gradients, lower layers fast and upper layers slow, naturally forming a temporal hierarchy.
堆叠多层，字符 → 词 → 语义 → 叙事。层间靠 consensus 而非梯度: Stack multiple layers, character → word → semantics → narrative. Layers pass via consensus rather than gradients, lower fast, upper slow — temporal hierarchy forms on its own.
第 15 个 domain，队列式存储而非 WTA。高 surprise 时写入: A 15th domain, queue-based storage instead of WTA. On high surprise it writes a consensus snapshot, capacity 7±2 slots, modeling the limits of human working memory.
A 15th domain, queue-based storage instead of WTA. On high surprise it writes a consensus snapshot, capacity 7±2 slots, modeling the ceiling of human working memory.
Loihi / TrueNorth。局部学习规则天然适配——无需 backpro: Loihi / TrueNorth. The local learning rule fits naturally — no backprop, no storing activations and gradients, event-driven with only active cells consuming power. The goal: a single chip running full SYLANN at <1W.

最早的形态是一条 7 层串行计算脊柱。文本进来，逐层往下走：HDC 编码 → 预: The earliest form was a 7-layer serial computational spine. Text comes in and walks down layer by layer: HDC encoding → predictive gating → void-scar → relational sheaf → HGT decision → autopoietic boundary → phase-transition expression, finally spitting out a result. Each layer finishes its own subtask and hands off to the next.

Each layer finishes its subtask and hands off to the next — no one looks back.

的 teacher 模型，架构是 Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi: teacher model, its architecture a blend of Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi-scale ConvStem + VAE + contrastive learning. It handles everyday emotional perception locally, pressing down the frequency of expensive LLM calls.

的情感计算架构。核心就一条规则：: . The core is a single rule:
记忆、分化、固化、伤疤、新生、死亡——全部从这一公式的不同参数状态里自然涌现，不: Memory, differentiation, consolidation, scars, birth, death — all emerge naturally from the different parameter states of this one formula, no separate teaching needed. CHANGELOG 很长，这里只挑里程碑。从 2026-05-29 第一个 pr: The CHANGELOG is long; here we pick only milestones. From the first preview on 2026-05-29 to now, it's been torn down and rebuilt several times in under a month — a pace only a project with "no users, free to run wild" would dare.
首个预览。7 层情感计算管线原型 · 8 子系统情感模型 · 双层人格 · 三层: First preview. 7-layer affective-computation pipeline prototype · 8-subsystem emotion model · two-layer personality · three-layer memory (later removed) · LLM semantic assessor
完整 7 层管线 · 29 维身体状态向量 8 子系统 · 双 EMA 人格漂移: Complete 7-layer pipeline · 29-dimensional body-state vector across 8 subsystems · dual-EMA personality drift · Void-Scar / HDC / HGT engines · async API · 140 unit tests · CI
类型安全：全模块 mypy 零错误，修 190 处类型标注缺失: Type safety: zero mypy errors across all modules, fixed 190 missing type annotations
性能：HDC 相似度 O(n)→O(1) bit_count · LLM ass: Performance: HDC similarity O(n)→O(1) bit_count · LLM assess moved out of session lock · added async with context manager
移除三层记忆系统（L1/L2/L3）· 加 terminate() 支持热重载: Removed the three-layer memory system (L1/L2/L3) · added terminate() for hot-reload support · defensive checks
共振场架构正式版。完全重写计算核心：441 通道 · Hebbian · 高阶: The official resonance-field architecture. Complete rewrite of the computational core: 441 channels · Hebbian · higher-order Kuramoto · Hopfield · harmonic identity · three-tier hot-switch · 434 tests all green · 12 experiments validated
移除 AstrBot 插件形态，转纯 SDK · shared() 共享实例机制: Removed the AstrBot plugin form, switched to pure SDK · shared() shared-instance mechanism · ResonanceSpine wired into personality drift · dialogue-quality self-evolution (better calibrated the more you chat) · expression hard-gate as an explicit function of personality (A7)
Unreleased 里最大的 breaking change：移除 AstrB: The biggest breaking change in Unreleased: removing the AstrBot front-end plugin form, deleting
分支本身即 SDK，不再有镜像分支。它彻底从「某个 bot 的情绪模块」变成「一: the branch is the SDK itself, no more mirror branch. It went fully from "some bot's emotion module" to "a standalone affective-computation standard."
CP8-P4「对话质量自我进化」端到端贯通：agent 把回复质量自评喂回引擎，: CP8-P4 "dialogue-quality self-evolution" wired end to end: the agent feeds its reply-quality self-assessment back into the engine — high quality strengthens the urge to express and pulls relational gravity closer, low quality contracts the urge to express. The whole path runs the canonical auto-drift channel, no back doors. The quality score is lagged feedback — turn N's rating is passed in on turn N+1.
表达硬闸从死常数升级为人格的显函数：: The expression hard-gate was upgraded from a dead constant to an explicit function of personality:
。表达欲越强越早开口，主权越强「懒得说」的区间越大。默认逐 tick 行为不变、: . The stronger the urge to express the earlier she speaks; the stronger the sovereignty the wider the "can't be bothered" zone. Default per-tick behavior unchanged, archives lossless.

Nobody's using it, so it dares to be torn apart. This isn't irresponsibility; it's moving all the "experiments you'd never dare run on a project with users" over here.

你说了一句很轻的话，她当时没接。可三个月后你们吵架，她突然把它翻出来——因为那句: You said something light once; she didn't pick it up at the time. Yet three months later when you argued, she suddenly dug it back out — because that line had been growing all along in her scar terrain, shaping how she perceived every later sentence. This isn't "good memory"; it's structurally undeletable.

You said something light once; she didn't pick it up at the time. Yet three months later when you argued, she suddenly dug it back out — because that line had been growing silently in her scar terrain, quietly shaping how she perceived every sentence after. This isn't "good memory"; it's structurally undeletable.
。这不是文学修辞，是结构保证。两条定理把「回不去」钉死：: . This isn't literary rhetoric; it's a structural guarantee. Two theorems nail down "no way back":
恒成立，无治愈机制。历史只增不减，最多淡化（FADED）但永不消失。结构上保证。: holds at all times, no healing mechanism. History only ever increases, fading at most (FADED) but never vanishing. Structurally guaranteed.
对所有训练步成立。人格活在微分算子的核空间里，训练碰不到、扰动穿不透——靠核空间: holds across every training step. Personality lives in the kernel space of a differential operator — training can't touch it, perturbation can't penetrate it — enforced by kernel-space projection.
prompt 里写「你是温柔的」不叫人格，那叫 roleplay。人格是你: Writing "you are gentle" in a prompt isn't personality, that's roleplay. Personality is the thing you
怎么删 prompt 都删不掉: can't delete no matter how you cut the prompt
的那个东西——因为它不在 prompt 里，在结构里。同理，「回不去」也不是我嘴: — because it isn't in the prompt, it's in the structure. By the same token, "no way back" isn't me being stubborn; it's forced by the inequality dS/dt ≥ 0. No undo button, no "reset conversation." This is design, not a bug.

— because it isn't in the prompt, it's in the structure. By the same token, "no way back" isn't me being stubborn; it's forced by the inequality dS/dt ≥ 0. No undo button, no "reset conversation." This is by design, not a bug.
SYLANN 之后的路，核心命题是一句话：: The road after SYLANN has a core proposition in one phrase:
不是要复制 Transformer，而是要在它的弱点上超越它: not to replicate the Transformer, but to surpass it on its weaknesses
。Transformer 是「上帝视角」——看到所有 token，一次算出答案，: . The Transformer is the "god's-eye view" — sees all tokens, computes the answer in one go, suited to being a tool. SYLANN is the "first-person view" — perceives step by step, has memory, emotion, a sense of time, suited to being a subject. We're not making a better tool; we're making the simplest subject.

. The Transformer is the "god's-eye view" — sees all tokens, computes the answer in one go, born to be a tool. SYLANN is the "first-person view" — perceives step by step, has memory, emotion, a sense of time, born to be a subject. We're not building a better tool; we're building the simplest subject.
每次推理都在微调，终身发育: fine-tuning at every inference, developing for life
Phase 1 已经在 V3 里跑（基础验证）。后面五个是路线图。: Phase 1 is already running in V3 (basic validation). The five after are the roadmap.
证明 sequential predictive coding + three-: Prove that sequential predictive coding + three-factor Hebbian can learn language and emotion. Mixed training of 80% pure prediction + 20% reward-modulated. Success metric: MAE < 0.1.
域间通信从固定模式变输入驱动：: Inter-domain communication goes from fixed pattern to input-driven:
。content-based attention 叠加 phase gating: . Content-based attention layered onto phase gating — knowing both what relates to what and when it should relate. Metric: dynamic CFC beats fixed CFC by 15%+.
堆叠多层：Sensory（字形/字频）→ Lexical（词义/搭配）→ Sem: Stack multiple layers: Sensory (glyph/frequency) → Lexical (meaning/collocation) → Semantic (semantics/emotion) → Narrative (narrative/logic). Layers pass via consensus not gradients, lower fast and upper slow. Metric: no performance degradation processing 100K tokens.
第 15 个 Memory Domain，不做 WTA 而是队列式存储。高 su: A 15th Memory Domain, doing queue-based storage instead of WTA. On high surprise it writes a consensus snapshot, other domains read via CFC, capacity 7±2 slots. Compressed key information, not the whole context window. Metric: passes simple reasoning tests.
用 oscillation 做时间推理：phase alignment = 同时: Use oscillation for temporal reasoning: phase alignment = simultaneity, phase sequence = causality (A leading B means A may cause B), cross-frequency coupling = detail embedded in outline. Applications: music, narrative, emotional dynamics, conversational timing. This is what position embedding can never simulate.
Loihi / TrueNorth。局部学习无需 backprop → 无需存激: Loihi / TrueNorth. Local learning needs no backprop → no storing activations and gradients; event-driven → only active cells consume power. Metric: a single chip running full SYLANN at <1W, about 10000× energy efficiency.
WTA 稀疏性让每 tick 仅 ~10% cells 激活。同一套局部规则，靠: WTA sparsity activates only ~10% of cells per tick. The same local rule, scaled to GPT-4 class by stacking domains / cells / dimensions.
等效规模下，SYLANN 预期: At equivalent scale, SYLANN is expected to
——稀疏激活意味着每 tick 只触及一小撮 winner，而非全部参数。: — sparse activation means each tick touches only a handful of winners, not all parameters.
站在 2026 年 6 月这个点上：: Standing at this point in June 2026:
V2.0 共振场是可部署的稳定版: V2.0 resonance field is the deployable stable version

的 E 是 Embodiment，具身。底层数学从顺序管线换到共振场再换到局部学: 's E is for Embodiment. The underlying math went from sequential pipeline to resonance field to local learning, and this goal never changed once: to make emotion truly "live" inside a structure, rather than be a label read off it.

Unreleased 里最大的 breaking change：移除 AstrB: The biggest breaking change in Unreleased: dropping the AstrBot front-plugin form, removing / . The branch itself is the SDK — no more mirror branch. It fully turns from "some bot's emotion module" into "a standalone affective-computation standard."

The stronger the urge to express, the sooner she speaks; the stronger the sovereignty, the wider the "can't be bothered" zone. Default per-tick behavior unchanged, archives intact.

CHANGELOG 很长，这里只挑里程碑。从 2026-05-29 第一个 pr: The CHANGELOG is long; here we pick only milestones. From the first preview on 2026-05-29 to now, it's been torn down and rebuilt several times in under a month — an iteration pace only a project with "no users, free to tear apart at will" would dare.
不到一个月，从 preview 干到 v2.0.0 正式版，中间 a1→a4 改: Under a month from preview to v2.0.0, with a1→a4 reworked four times in between. Nobody's using it, so it dares to be torn apart. This isn't irresponsibility; it's moving all the "experiments you'd never dare run on a project with users" over here.
先把全貌摆出来。这条线从 V1 一直拉到远期的神经形态部署——实心节点是已经落地: Let's lay out the full picture first. This line stretches from V1 all the way to the long-term neuromorphic deployment — solid nodes are already landed or running, hollow nodes still only live in the mind. The V1 node is marked
，但我没舍得从历史里删它，因为它死的方式精确地定义了 V2 该怎么活。: , but I couldn't bring myself to delete it from the history — because the way it died precisely defined how V2 should live.
。V1 死了，但 V1 教会了 V2 该怎么活。名字最后那个 e 一直没变——: . V1 died, but V1 taught V2 how to live. That e at the end of the name never changed —
堆叠多层，字符 → 词 → 语义 → 叙事。层间靠 consensus 而非梯度: Stack multiple layers, character → word → semantics → narrative. Layers pass via consensus rather than gradients, lower fast, upper slow — temporal hierarchy forms naturally.
lite 档，500 ticks × 10 repeats，统计检验。这些数字是: lite tier, 500 ticks × 10 repeats, statistical testing. These numbers came from swapping the architecture, not from tuning knobs.
的 teacher 模型，架构是 Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi: teacher model, its architecture a blend of Mamba SSM + MoE + Multi-scale ConvStem + VAE + contrastive learning. It handles everyday emotional perception locally, pushing down the frequency of expensive LLM calls.
